description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring multiple interconnected buildings with pitched roofs and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The property includes a main house, a secondary structure, and a detached building, all surrounded by landscaped lawns, trees, and paved pathways. A long driveway leads to the main entrance, while a fenced backyard area contains a rectangular swimming pool and a poolside pavilion. The buildings have large windows, clean geometric lines, and a neutral color palette dominated by gray and white. The outdoor spaces are well-defined, with hedges and fences providing privacy and separation between different functional zones. The overall design emphasizes contemporary aesthetics, open views, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern multi-building house complex with pitched roofs, large windows, landscaped lawns, and a backyard pool area. The design features clean lines, neutral colors, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house complex from the side, highlighting the driveway, main entrance, and the full length of the backyard pool area with its pavilion.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the property from the rear, focusing on the fenced pool area, the pavilion, and the back facades of the buildings with visible windows and landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a perspective from the opposite side, displaying the main house, secondary building, and the open green spaces with trees and hedges.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a front-facing view, emphasizing the driveway approach, main entryway, and the arrangement of the buildings with visible pitched roofs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a paved approach, minimal overhang, and no prominent porch or columns.
